mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: nephrotic syndrome, neurological symptoms (restlessness, dyspnea, diminated movement), hepatosplenomegaly
fever, arthralgias (abnormality of the knee), pleurisy (pleural effusion), hemorrhagic manifestations (hemoptysis, ecchymosis), antiphospholipid antibodies positivity
renal involvement (nephropathy, proteinuria), angioedema (facial swelling, hypersensitivity to cold), hypertension, corneal opacity (foveal hyperpigmentation)
palpable masses (barrel shaped chest, tip toe gait), pulmonary symptoms (dyspnea, cough), vascular anomalies (aortic root dilatation, vascular rings)
urinary urgency, darkened pigments (macular and foveal hyperpigmentation), joint pain (arthritis), cardiac involvement (valvulitis, endocarditis)
nephrotic syndrome, congestive heart failure, weight loss, peripheral edema, arrhythmias
diabetes mellitus, adrenal insufficiency, thyroid disorders, autoantibodies (positive ANCA, anti-dsDNA), hyponatremia
glomerulonephritis with predominantly anti-glomerular basement membrane antibodies, lung hemorrhage (cough, hemoptysis), pulmonary fibrosis
cutaneous findings including cafe au lait spots, freckling in axillary and inguinal regions, neurodevelopmental delays, scoliosis, short stature
